product_type: Two Post Inground Lift - Wide Base

installation_requirements.concrete_floor: (28) 1" dia x 8" Wej-it anchors in 8" minimum floor
installation_requirements.deeper_base_plates: This lift has deeper base plates to accommodate 8" concrete slabs

specifications.synchronization: Hydraulic fluid displacement using no chains, cables nor overhead obstructions
specifications.carriage_bearings: (16) 5" diameter (8 per carriage) double sealed self lubricating
specifications.thrust_bearings: (8) 4" diameter (4 per carriage) double sealed self lubricating
specifications.revision: D - ALI verification logo change (12/15 by CHS)

features: Symmetrical 2-post lift design with wide base
Deeper base plates to accommodate 8" concrete slabs
Hydraulic fluid displacement synchronization - no chains, cables, or overhead obstructions
Clear and unobstructed floor access between posts
Single point lock release at control
Same physical dimensions as TP-26A-WB but rated for 30,000 lbs
optional_equipment: 5" Frame Adapters (stackable) - 4 included as standard equipment
7 1/2" Frame Adapters (stackable) - 4 included as standard equipment
10" Frame Adapters (stackable) - 4 included as standard equipment
certifications: Tested and certified by a nationally recognized testing laboratory (NRTL) to meet requirements of U.L. Standard 201 for garage equipment and ANSI/ALI ALCTV-2011 for automotive lift construction
safety_features: Mechanical Safety Release: Single point lock release at control
Hydraulic Safety System: Automatic, all position
Swing Arm Locks: Automatic locking upon ascent

warranty.structural: 5 years (see specific Mohawk warranty for details)

notes: This lift has deeper base plates to accommodate 8" concrete slabs
Overhead hydraulic lines are optional on WB model
Overall width 16'-10" (wider than standard TP-30 at 15')
Same physical dimensions as TP-26A-WB but rated for 30,000 lbs
Mohawk Resources, Ltd. reserves the right to make changes without notice
